name: Mr. Money Pawn & Gun Inc.
description_short: Tampa pawn shop & licensed FFL dealer since ~1989. Offers 90-day collateral loans, gold buying, firearms sales, and buy/sell/trade on jewelry, tools, vehicles & more.
description_long:
Mr. Money Pawn & Gun Inc. has operated out of Tampa, Florida since approximately 1989, making it one of the longer-tenured independently owned pawn shops in the region with over 35 years of continuous community presence. Located at 3315 E Hillsborough Ave, the business holds an active Federal Firearms License — Type 02 (Pawnbroker in Firearms), ATF License #1-59-057-02-7F-47256, valid through June 1, 2027 — authorizing it to deal in new and used firearms and conduct FFL transfers. It is not affiliated with any national pawn chain and carries no CDFI, HUD-approved counselor, or NFCC nonprofit designations, as those credentials apply to financial counseling institutions rather than pawn businesses.

The core offering is collateral-based pawn loans on 90-day terms: customers bring a valued item, receive a cash loan against it, and may redeem their property by repaying the loan plus applicable fees within the term. Beyond lending, the shop buys, sells, and trades a wide variety of goods — gold (with a professional gold buyer on staff), jewelry including Rolex watches, firearms (new and used), tools, lawn equipment, boats, cars, motorcycles, and heavy equipment. Specific interest rates and fee schedules are not publicly listed; all terms must be confirmed in person at the store. The shop is open 364 days per year, providing near-daily access for customers with urgent cash needs.

What distinguishes Mr. Money Pawn & Gun from typical pawn shops is both its longevity and its willingness to handle large, high-value collateral that most competitors decline — including boats, motorcycles, motor vehicles, and heavy construction equipment. The 35-year track record in the same Tampa neighborhood has generated exceptional customer feedback: a 5.0/5 Google rating across 482 reviews and a 5/5 on Yelp, placing it among the highest-rated pawn operations in the Tampa Bay area. The presence of a dedicated professional gold buyer on duty also signals a level of specialization beyond the typical generalist shop.

For Tampa residents who need fast, asset-backed cash access, Mr. Money Pawn & Gun is a credible, well-established option — particularly for those with large or unusual collateral items. The honest caveats are the same as with any pawn lender: costs are typically higher than bank loans or credit union alternatives, rates are not transparent online, and the business operates from a single brick-and-mortar location with no mobile app or online portal. Customers seeking unsecured personal loans, credit counseling, or credit repair should look elsewhere, as this business exclusively operates on a physical-transaction, collateral-based model.

pricing.guarantee_details: Not applicable. Pawn shops operate on collateral-based loan and buy/sell/trade transactions, not service subscriptions.

certifications: Federal Firearms License (FFL) Type 02 — ATF License #1-59-057-02-7F-47256, valid through June 1, 2027

pros: Over 35 years in business (est. ~1989), one of Tampa's most established independent pawn shops
Exceptional 5.0/5 Google rating across 482 verified reviews — among the highest-rated pawn shops in the Tampa Bay area
Holds active ATF Federal Firearms License Type 02, enabling lawful firearms sales and FFL transfers
Open 364 days per year, providing near-daily availability for customers with urgent cash needs
Professional gold buyer on staff for accurate, competitive gold and jewelry valuations
Accepts large and unusual collateral — boats, cars, motorcycles, and heavy equipment — that most pawn shops decline
90-day pawn loan terms give customers a reasonable redemption window compared to shorter-term competitors
cons: Interest rates and fee schedules are not published online; all loan terms must be confirmed in person
Single Tampa location only — no online portal, no mobile app, and no e-commerce presence
Pawn loan costs are typically higher than conventional personal loans or credit union alternatives
BBB rating and accreditation status are unverified — no confirmed BBB profile found
No pickup, shipping, or remote transaction options; every interaction requires an in-person visit to the Hillsborough Ave location
best_for: Tampa-area residents who need same-day cash and have tangible assets to use as collateral
Firearm buyers and sellers looking for a licensed FFL dealer with transfer services in Tampa
Collectors and sellers of gold, jewelry, or luxury watches (including Rolex) seeking professional on-site valuation
Owners of large assets — boats, vehicles, motorcycles, or heavy equipment — who need short-term collateral-based financing
diagnosis: Mr. Money Pawn & Gun Inc. is best suited for Tampa residents who need fast, asset-backed cash and have physical collateral to pledge — especially those with high-value or oversized items like boats, vehicles, or equipment that most pawn shops won't accept. Its 35-year track record and near-perfect customer ratings make it a standout in the local pawn market. The primary caveat is that pawn loan fees are not disclosed online, and as with all pawn lending, costs will exceed what conventional banks or credit unions charge, so customers should review terms carefully before pledging valued items.
services: Gold buying (professional gold buyer on duty)
Jewelry buying and selling, including Rolex watches
Boats, cars, motorcycles, and heavy equipment pawn and purchase
General merchandise buy, sell, and trade
Electronics and valuables assessment and purchase
meta_description: Tampa pawn shop and licensed FFL dealer since 1989 offering 90-day collateral loans, gold buying, and firearms sales.
